overview: I built a conversational Feature Intake Copilot replacing PM request forms. Using Claude Sonnet/Opus with a two-gate architecture, it achieved 94% ground truth extraction accuracy across 3 personas, averaging 6 conversation turns and a 21.3/24 readiness score.

keyPoints.title: 94% ground truth extraction accuracy across 3 personas
Two-gate design: copilot extracts, PM decides quality
Two-call split fixed model skipping natural language responses
Claude misclassified feature type in 1 of 3 cases
Conversations handle bad input; pipelines fail on it
